scenes.title: OrangeHRM
scenes.narration: Welcome to OrangeHRM. In the next few minutes, you'll see exactly why HR leaders and people managers choose us to streamline workforce management and HR operations. Let's start with OrangeHRM.
scenes.description: OrangeHRM highlights Quick Launch HR Actions. Provides immediate access to leave applications, timesheets, and leave assignment features, enhancing workflow efficiency for HR staff and employees..

highlightTarget.description: Quick Launch HR Actions action button

scenes.title: OrangeHRM
scenes.narration: OrangeHRM: monitor My Actions Panel automatically. Shows pending tasks for the user, such as self-review and candidate interviews, improving workflow efficiency and task awareness.. Everything your team needs, right here.
scenes.description: OrangeHRM highlights My Actions Panel, Time at Work Widget. Shows pending tasks for the user, such as self-review and candidate interviews, improving workflow efficiency and task awareness..

scenes.title: OrangeHRM
scenes.narration: OrangeHRM: create Directory Results Table/List in real time. Displays matching employee records, allowing HR staff or managers to find contact or role details efficiently.. Everything your team needs, right here.
scenes.description: OrangeHRM highlights Directory Results Table/List, Employee Search and Filter. Displays matching employee records, allowing HR staff or managers to find contact or role details efficiently..

scenes.title: OrangeHRM
scenes.narration: OrangeHRM: review Employee Personal Details Form seamlessly. Allows viewing and editing of employee identification and personal information, crucial for HR records and compliance.. Everything your team needs, right here.
scenes.description: OrangeHRM highlights Employee Personal Details Form. Allows viewing and editing of employee identification and personal information, crucial for HR records and compliance..

highlightTarget.description: Employee Personal Details Form input form

scenes.title: OrangeHRM
scenes.narration: OrangeHRM: create Employee List Table instantly. Displays core employee data including name, ID, employment status, job title, supervisor, allowing quick overview and access.. Everything your team needs, right here.
scenes.description: OrangeHRM highlights Employee List Table, Search and Filtering. Displays core employee data including name, ID, employment status, job title, supervisor, allowing quick overview and access..

scenes.title: OrangeHRM
scenes.narration: OrangeHRM: create User List Table with zero manual effort. Provides administrators with a structured overview of existing users, their roles, statuses, and associated employee names. Enables organized access and potential bulk actions.. Everything your team needs, right here.
scenes.description: OrangeHRM highlights User List Table, Search and Filter Functionality. Provides administrators with a structured overview of existing users, their roles, statuses, and associated employee names. Enables organized access and potential bulk actions..

scenes.title: OrangeHRM
scenes.narration: And that's OrangeHRM — giving HR leaders and people managers the visibility, control, and speed to act on what matters most. OrangeHRM is just one piece of a platform built to transform how your business operates. Schedule a live demo today and see what we can unlock together.
scenes.description: OrangeHRM highlights OrangeHRM. streamline workforce management and HR operations.
